overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 featuring a cowboy character fly-fishing in a shallow river pool at the base of a waterfall. The scene transitions from bright sunny weather to a rainstorm, with the character slowly wading through the water while casting the line.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river pool at base of waterfall

events.description: fish splashes at the surface of the water near the fishing line

agents.ego_description: standing in knee-deep water repeatedly casting the fishing line toward the center of the pool and reeling

entered.detail: tall white waterfall cascading down rocky cliff face into the pool
steep gray rock formation behind the waterfall with layered strata
dense forest of evergreen trees lining the left riverbank
dense forest of evergreen trees lining the right riverbank
large rock protruding from the water surface in the middle of the pool
long wooden fishing rod held by the character with line extended

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a sunlit shallow river pool surrounded by dense evergreen forests, facing a tall waterfall cascading down a rocky cliff. The water is clear with visible stones beneath the surface. The character repeatedly casts the fishing line toward the center of the pool where fish occasionally splash.

events.description: weather transitions from sunny to light rain, darkening the sky and creating ripples on the water surface

agents.ego_description: continuing to fish while slowly wading toward the right side of the pool as rain begins to fall

segments.scene_description: As rain begins to fall, the scene darkens with overcast skies and the water surface becomes rippled. The character continues fishing while slowly moving toward the right, causing the waterfall to shift toward the left side of the frame. The dense forest remains visible on both sides while rain creates a atmospheric haze over the pool.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement in a river pool that transforms from a bright, sunlit sanctuary into a moody, rain-swept wilderness. It begins with the character casting a fishing line in clear, shallow water beneath a towering waterfall that cascades down a rocky cliff amidst dense evergreen forests. As rain begins to fall, the lighting shifts from bright sunlight to a dark, overcast gloom, causing the water's surface to ripple and an atmospheric haze to settle over the pool. The camera then tracks the character as they slowly wade toward the right, shifting the position of the waterfall toward the left side of the frame while the surrounding forest remains shrouded in the intensifying storm.
